ideation: This sequence animates the robot pointing directly at the viewer using both index fingers.  The movement starts with arms slightly away from the body, then moves to a clear pointing position, and finally relaxes slightly.  The use of both arms adds emphasis to the directness of the gesture. The lack of elbows requires careful positioning of the shoulders to create a convincing point.

frames.beat: arms start slightly out, ready to point
both arms extend forward, fingers aiming
fingers lock onto the target, a firm point
arms relax slightly, the gesture holds
